report.summary: UX audit of DeFAI guide page and DeFAIProtocolExplorer component — added clear-filters UX, search clear button, expand animation with reduced-motion support, improved empty state, and created missing OG image for /learn/defai-guide-2026.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Added 'Clear filters' button that appears when any filter/search is active, letting users reset all controls in one click
DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Added inline '✕' clear button inside search input when text is present for quick single-field reset
DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Added fadeInDown animation (0.15s ease-out) on accordion expand for smoother content reveal
DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Added @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rule to disable all animations for users with motion sensitivity
DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Redesigned empty state — now shows a styled card with search icon, helpful message, and 'Clear all filters' CTA instead of plain text
DeFAI guide page: Verified mobile layout, stats grid (2-col mobile / 3-col desktop), table overflow-x-auto, and all interactive elements have adequate touch targets

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-defai-guide.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with purple→blue gradient title, 3 stat cards ($2B+ TVL, $18B+ Mkt Cap, 150+ Protocols), Perceive/Reason/Act agent loop illustration with dashed connection lines, protocol name pills (Almanak, Virtuals, ElizaOS, Fetch.ai, Autonolas, Beep), brand gradient accent bar, grid pattern background

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Logged for Future Sprints)
items: DeFAIProtocolExplorer still uses inline styles throughout — consider gradual migration to Tailwind for consistency (carry-forward from previous cycle)
OG image created as SVG — needs PNG conversion via sharp or Vercel OG for production social cards
DeFAI guide comparison table in Section 1 could benefit from a card-based layout on mobile instead of horizontal scroll for better readability
Consider adding a 'scroll to top' affordance on the DeFAI guide given its 900+ line length
